spec_match.rationale: The demo now shows the current text-fit values none, grow, shrink, and shrink 60%; DevTools MCP verification is still blocked in this session.

interactive.rationale: The container width range slider remains wired to all rows, but the required chrome-devtools-mcp interaction pass was unavailable.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The index blurb perfectly maps to the demo's purpose of comparing the various text-fit values side-by-side.

edge_cases.rationale: Because only one static text ('Headline Text') is used, the grow versus shrink behavior is not fully stress-tested across short and very long strings.

references.rationale: The reference list successfully includes the target ChromeStatus entry link.

design_system.rationale: The demo complies with the layout, CSS variable structure, and typography of the global design system.

openQuestions.title: Add custom text inputs or predefined text length presets
openQuestions.detail: To clearly demonstrate that shrink only reduces overflowing text while grow expands short text into available space, allow the user to switch between short text ('Short'), standard text ('Headline Text'), and very long text ('An Extremely Bounded Long Headline Text That Will Overload the Container').

summary: Static repair updated the comparison to current CSS Text 4 syntax: text-fit: grow, text-fit: shrink, and text-fit: shrink 60%. Browser verification remains blocked until chrome-devtools-mcp is available.
